steps.text: Report suspected Zika cases to public health departments.
Report confirmed Zika cases to CDC.
Postpone travel to areas with Zika.
Search for mcr-1 in bacterial samples from human, retail meat, and food animal sources.
Notify states, hospitals, and clinical laboratories about the discovery of mcr-1.
Develop and deploy a rapid laboratory test to help clinical labs find bacteria with the mcr-1 gene.
Test other new diagnostics with FDA that can rapidly detect bacteria with the gene.
Respond to and contain new mcr-1 cases.
Take detailed travel histories from patients with febrile disease.
Determine the types of care that require standard versus extra infection control precautions.

preconditions.text: If you are a US healthcare provider with a suspected Zika case
If you are a public health department with a confirmed Zika case
China reports finding the new mcr-1 gene

constraints.text: Staff involved in reprocessing flexible endoscopes must understand and consistently follow seven essential steps.
Apply recommended personal protective equipment and quarantine measures for extra infection control precautions.
